calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-16-2008 Continued To Jan-16-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 611

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-17-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Diane Elan Wick, Clerk Karissa Shaw, Not Reported. (611)

APPEARANCES:
Plaintiff/Respondent Kristen Stuecher is present In Pro Per.
Plaintiff's witness Gina Chinchilla
Defendant/Appellant Fanta Deluxe represented by owner Young Park is present In Pro Per.
Defense witness Claudia Santos of Supreme Leather & Rug Co.

This matter comes on calendar for a Trial De Novo. All litigants and witnesses have been affirmed by the clerk. Both litigants as well as the witnesses give testimony.

The following plaintiff's exhibits are marked;
Ex. A - Emporio Armani receipts, 2 pages.
Ex. B - Fanta Deluxe Cleaners receipt, 1 page.
Ex. C - K. Steucher letter to Fanta Deluxe Cleaners, dated 7/9/07, 1 page.
Ex. D - Spiral Notebook and 4 pages submitted by witness Chinchilla Re: Jacket.

The following defense exhibit is marked;
Ex. 1 - Internation Textile Analysis Laboratory Report, dated 7/6/07, 1 page (submitted by witness Santos).

After hearing all testimony, the court takes the matter under submission.

1/17/08 - JUDGMENT ENTERED

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-18-2007 Continued To Jan-16-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-26-2007 Judgment Entered
